footer.descripcion: We promote compliance with international human rights standards through strategic litigation, technical cooperation, and academic training.
footer.sugef_texto: "The public is warned that the International Institute for Social Responsibility and Human Rights Association is supervised only in matters of prevention of money laundering, terrorist financing, and financing of the proliferation of weapons of mass destruction, and is also subject to binding provisions of the Financial Intelligence Unit of the Costa Rican Drug Institute. Therefore, SUGEF does not financially supervise the Association, nor the businesses it offers, nor its security, stability, or solvency."

home.hero_subtitulo: We promote compliance with international standards through citizen and government participation.
home.que_hacemos_titulo: What do we do at IIRESODH?
home.que_hacemos_subtitulo: We combine legal action, technical cooperation, and academic training to generate real impact in society.
home.litigio_desc: Legal defense before international courts to set precedents in the protection of rights.
home.incidencia_desc: Research, impact reports, and strategic litigation documents.
home.formacion_desc: Certifications and academic programs designed for leaders of social change.
home.contacto_subtitulo: We are here to collaborate and answer your questions.
home.msg_error: An error occurred while sending the message.

quienes_somos.header_subtitulo: Defending democracy and human rights from Costa Rica to the world.
quienes_somos.historia_1_pt2: was born in San José, Costa Rica, managing to grow very quickly for broader and better care that today allows us to have working offices in several countries.
quienes_somos.historia_2: Since its creation it was an entity with clarity in its objectives for the strengthening, promotion, and protection of human rights, and thereby influencing a culture where respect is assumed by companies and public institutions as a direct form of development.
quienes_somos.historia_3: We have cooperation agreements with the CCPR-Centre in Geneva, the Inter-American Commission on Human Rights, the National University of La Plata, and the University Institute of Yucatan. Our staff has extensive experience in the Inter-American and universal United Nations systems.
quienes_somos.historia_4: Since 2013 we have trained more than 1,500 people in Latin America and Europe. In 2021 we opened the institute of higher university studies (U-IIRESODH) in Mexico to offer specialized master's degrees.
quienes_somos.historia_5: Since 2019 we have implemented cooperation projects oriented towards advocacy and strategic litigation in Nicaragua, Venezuela, Costa Rica, and Colombia, with the support of donors such as the embassies of the United Kingdom and Switzerland, and the UNDP.
quienes_somos.mision_texto: To promote the respect and fulfillment of international human rights standards through strategic litigation and training projects, providing support to the public and private sectors regarding social responsibility.
quienes_somos.vision_texto: To be an institution that promotes the respect and inclusion of human rights through defense and training strategies, in order to build a democratic and participatory society.
quienes_somos.principles_1_tex: Intrinsic and inalienable value of each person. It requires treating individuals as an end in themselves, guaranteeing a life free of humiliation and based on mutual recognition.
quienes_somos.principles_2_tex: Safeguard the fundamental guarantees that allow living with freedom, justice, and peace. They act as a protective shield against the abuse of power and systematic discrimination.
quienes_somos.principles_3_tex: Ensure that all people have access to the same opportunities, eliminating structural barriers and prejudices to build a fair and equitable society.
quienes_somos.principles_4_tex: Adopt sustainable practices that minimize our ecological footprint, recognizing our interdependence with nature to protect it for future generations.
quienes_somos.principles_5_tex: Act with integrity, avoiding conflicts of interest and fighting corruption. Foster a culture of accountability where honesty is the norm.
quienes_somos.principles_6_tex: Integrate all individuals into community life, especially the most vulnerable, breaking down physical, economic, and cultural barriers that prevent participation.
quienes_somos.org_texto_1: The organizational structure of the IIRESODH has the Presidency as its highest formal authority figure, to which all internal units are attached.
quienes_somos.org_texto_2: A functional criterion is applied for structural units and a territorial criterion to reflect our offices in different countries of the world, both subordinate to the Presidency.

equipo.header_subtitulo: The human talent behind the promotion and protection of human rights.

informes.header_subtitulo: Transparency and accountability regarding our management and impact on Human Rights.
informes.parrafo_1: In our commitment to transparency, every year we publish a detailed report summarizing our activities, achievements, impact on strategic litigation, and the financial status of the organization.
informes.parrafo_2: These documents are a pillar of our accountability to donors, partners, and the general public, reflecting the work done in the promotion and defense of human rights in the region.
informes.no_informes_desc: We will be publishing our management reports soon.

litigio.header_subtitulo: Active defense and training in universal and regional protection systems.
litigio.intro_p1: promotes international strategic litigation as a fundamental tool for the defense and promotion of human rights. We provide highly specialized training to non-governmental organizations, human rights defenders, and civil society actors, empowering them to use the judicial and quasi-judicial mechanisms of regional and universal protection systems.
litigio.intro_p2: Our academic programs are led by globally renowned experts and active officials from the main international bodies and courts. In parallel, we assume legal representation in landmark cases involving systematic human rights violations across various jurisdictions.
litigio.cert_p1_pt1: Through our flagship program, the Certification in International Strategic Litigation,
litigio.cert_p1_pt3: with the technical and legal tools necessary to litigate before the Inter-American Court of Human Rights, UN Committees, and access United Nations Special Procedures.
litigio.cert_p2_pt1: Additionally, we offer an advanced edition of this
litigio.cert_p2_pt3: , designed to delve into the mandates and procedures of the International Court of Justice, the International Criminal Court, and the European Court of Human Rights.
litigio.que_es_subtitulo: Justice that transforms realities, beyond borders.
litigio.que_es_p1: When the paths of local justice are exhausted or fail to protect fundamental rights, the international community offers a final hope. International strategic litigation does not seek solely to resolve an individual case; it seeks to transform the system from its roots.
litigio.que_es_p2: It consists of selecting and bringing landmark cases before international bodies and courts (such as the Inter-American Human Rights System or the United Nations) to highlight systematic human rights violations. Our goal is not only to win a trial, but to achieve a multiplier effect: to create legal precedents that force States to change unjust laws, fully compensate victims, and prevent injustices from being repeated.
litigio.como_hacemos_titulo: How do we do it? The Power of Pro-Bono
litigio.como_hacemos_p1: In our organization, we firmly believe that access to international justice should not be a privilege of a few. That is why we dedicate our knowledge, time, and resources entirely free of charge (pro-bono) to serving people, communities, and groups in vulnerable situations.
litigio.como_hacemos_p2: We assume the technical defense with the highest standards of legal excellence, providing comprehensive support to victims and coordinating efforts with social movements. Strategic litigation is our way of leveling the scales and putting international law at the service of human dignity.
litigio.pilares_titulo: The Three Pillars of Our Impact:
litigio.pilar_1: Creation of Precedents: We achieve international rulings that serve as a "legal shield" to protect thousands of people in similar situations.
litigio.pilar_2: Structural Reform: We pressure governments to modify public policies and laws that violate human rights.
litigio.pilar_3: Visibility and Awareness: We bring the voices of the victims to the most important global stages, breaking the silence and impunity.
litigio.cita_final: "We seek for the victory of one person to become the justice of an entire community."
litigio.alt_img_cij: IIRESODH lawyers at the International Court of Justice
litigio.caption_cij: IIRESODH legal team before the International Court of Justice.

cursos.header_subtitulo: Specialized training in Human Rights and Strategic Litigation.
cursos.seccion_desc: Our academic offer is designed to empower professionals, human rights defenders, and students with practical tools and updated knowledge in the field of Human Rights.
cursos.proximamente_desc: We are preparing new courses and diplomas. Stay tuned to our social networks.

incidencia.header_subtitulo: Strategic actions and reports presented before international protection systems.
incidencia.intro_p1_pt1: As part of our commitment to the defense of human dignity, at
incidencia.intro_p1_pt2: we generate research, impact reports, and strategic litigation documents.
incidencia.intro_p2: Below, we make our documentary archive of international advocacy publicly available, designed to set precedents, inform public opinion, and provide legal tools before organizations such as the IACHR and the Inter-American Court.
incidencia.no_docs_desc: We will soon be publishing our advocacy documents.
incidencia.mapa_subtitulo: Hover over the red dots on the map to explore our advocacy by country.

privacidad.header_subtitulo: Transparency and data protection for all our users.
privacidad.gen_sec1_p1: Welcome to the Privacy Policy of the International Institute of Social Responsibility and Human Rights (hereinafter, "IIRESODH", "we", or "our").
privacidad.gen_sec1_p2: This policy describes how we collect, use, protect, and share your personal information when you visit our institutional website (https://iiresodh.org) and communicate with us.
privacidad.gen_sec1_p3: The associated technological service PIDA-AI (https://pida-ai.com) is managed by an independent legal entity and is strictly governed by its own Privacy Policy, available on its respective website.
privacidad.gen_sec2_p1: The controller of your personal data is the International Institute of Social Responsibility and Human Rights – IIRESODH, an organization domiciled at San Rafael Corporate Center, 3rd floor, office 28, San José, CP-10203, Costa Rica.
privacidad.gen_sec3_l1_txt: We collect personal data when you contact us, register for our activities, or make a donation. This includes your name, email address, country of residence, and the content of your messages.
privacidad.gen_sec3_l2_txt: For the purchase of digital books and manuals in PDF format, we collect and process your IP address, device identifiers, and geolocation data to prevent piracy and ensure compliance with personal license terms.
privacidad.gen_sec3_l3_txt: When browsing our site, we collect standard technical information (IP address, browser type, pages visited) for analysis and security purposes to improve our institutional services.
privacidad.gen_sec4_tit: 4. What Do We Use Your Information For? (Purposes and Legal Basis)
privacidad.gen_sec4_l1_txt: To respond to your inquiries, information requests, and manage registrations for our programs. (Legal basis: Consent).
privacidad.gen_sec4_l2_txt: Sending newsletters or news about our work in defense of human rights, provided you have agreed to receive them. (Legal basis: Consent).
privacidad.gen_sec4_l3_txt: To validate the integrity of digital material delivery, track the authorized use of PDF files, and prevent the illicit distribution or piracy of protected content. (Legal basis: Legitimate interest and contractual compliance).
privacidad.gen_sec4_l4_txt: To analyze our site's traffic to optimize the user experience and prevent computer fraud. (Legal basis: Legitimate interest).
privacidad.gen_sec5_tit: 5. Who Do We Share Your Information With?
privacidad.gen_sec5_p1: IIRESODH does not sell, rent, or market your personal information under any circumstances. We only share it in strictly necessary cases:
privacidad.gen_sec5_l1_txt: Companies that provide us with web hosting services or platforms for sending newsletters, which operate under strict confidentiality agreements.
privacidad.gen_sec5_l2_txt: When required by a competent authority within the framework of the law and due jurisdictional process.
privacidad.gen_sec6_p1: IIRESODH applies technical and organizational security measures to protect your information against unauthorized access, loss, or alteration. Our site uses SSL certificates to encrypt information during transmission. In the case of digital books, invisible traceability metadata is used to guarantee the protection of the institution's intellectual property.
privacidad.gen_sec7_p1: We will retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy or to comply with current legal or tax obligations applicable to the institution.
privacidad.gen_sec8_p1: As a user, you have the right to Access your data, Rectify it if it is incorrect, request its Deletion, or Object to certain processing (such as unsubscribing from our newsletters). To exercise your rights, please write to us at:
privacidad.gen_sec9_p1: IIRESODH reserves the right to update this Privacy Policy to reflect changes in our institutional practices or applicable regulations. The date of the last revision will always be posted at the top of this page.
privacidad.mx_sec1_p1: In strict compliance with the Federal Law on the Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties (LFPDPPP) applicable in the United Mexican States, this Privacy Notice is issued to inform users (hereinafter, the "Data Subject") about the processing of their data on the institutional website: https://iiresodh.org.
privacidad.mx_sec1_p2: This Notice does not cover the technological service PIDA-AI, which has its own legal Controller and independent Privacy Notice at https://pida-ai.com.
privacidad.mx_sec2_tit: 2. Identity and Domicile of the Data Controller
privacidad.mx_sec2_p1: The International Institute of Social Responsibility and Human Rights (IIRESODH), domiciled at San Rafael Corporate Center, 3rd floor, office 28, San José, CP-10203, Costa Rica, is the Controller responsible for collecting your personal data, the use given to it, and its protection.
privacidad.mx_sec3_p1: For the purposes outlined in this notice, we may collect the following personal data:
privacidad.mx_sec3_l1_txt: Full name, email, affiliated institution, and country.
privacidad.mx_sec3_l2_txt: IP address, downloaded file metadata, geolocation, and unique device identifiers linked to the purchase of academic manuals.
privacidad.mx_sec3_p2: IIRESODH does not collect or process sensitive personal data for the operation of this portal. Please refrain from sending information classified as sensitive through our general contact forms.
privacidad.mx_sec4_l1: To provide requested information regarding our activities and defense of human rights.
privacidad.mx_sec4_l2: To contact the Data Subject in response to their messages, questions, or comments.
privacidad.mx_sec4_l3: To manage registration for events, forums, or academic programs dictated by IIRESODH.
privacidad.mx_sec4_l4: To process the sale of digital bibliographic material and ensure the integrity of assets through technical measures to prevent piracy and infractions of the Federal Copyright Law.
privacidad.mx_sec4_l6: Statistical analysis of website use for continuous improvement.
privacidad.mx_sec4_p1: If you do not want your personal data to be processed for Secondary Purposes, you can express your refusal by sending an email to contacto@iiresodh.org.
privacidad.mx_sec5_tit: 5. Transfers and/or Remissions of Personal Data
privacidad.mx_sec5_p1: We inform you that your personal data is not shared, sold, or transferred to third parties (other controllers) within or outside the country, except in cases where the Law expressly requires it (Article 37 of the LFPDPPP).
privacidad.mx_sec5_p2: IIRESODH may make data remissions to service providers (e.g., web servers, email managers) acting as Processors, who assume the same obligations of confidentiality and security established in this Notice.
privacidad.mx_sec6_tit: 6. ARCO Rights and Revocation of Consent
privacidad.mx_sec6_p1: You have the right to know what personal data we have about you (Access); to request the correction of your information if it is inaccurate (Rectification); to have it deleted from our records (Cancellation); as well as to Object to the use of your data for specific purposes.
privacidad.mx_sec6_p2: To exercise any of the ARCO rights, or to revoke your consent, you must submit the respective request via email to contacto@iiresodh.org, including:
privacidad.mx_sec6_l1: Your name and email to receive a response.
privacidad.mx_sec6_l3: A clear and precise description of the data regarding which you seek to exercise the right.
privacidad.mx_sec7_p1: Our website uses technologies such as cookies to improve your experience, analyze traffic, and tailor content. You can set your web browser to refuse all cookies or to alert you when a cookie is being sent.
privacidad.mx_sec8_p1: IIRESODH reserves the right to make modifications or updates to this privacy notice at any time. Any changes will be available and visible to the public on this institutional website.

not_found.descripcion: Sorry, the resource you are looking for does not exist or has been moved. Use the navigation menu or return to our homepage.

irene.saludo_inicial: Hello! I am IRENE, IIRESODH's virtual assistant. How can I help you today?
irene.error_mensaje: Oops, I had a little dizzy spell in my circuits. Can you try again?
irene.modal_desc: IRENE will forget the current conversation and you will start a new one.
